name: Furnished Sublease Outreach
description: Outreach for a furnished sublease opportunity at a specific building
subject: Sublease Opportunity at {building}
body:
Hi {first_name},

Hope you're doing well. Not sure if you're the right person at {company} to talk to about office space, but thought I would reach out.

My name is Abdul-Samad Olagunju, and I'm a corporate real estate advisor at Cresa focused on helping tenants reduce costs and find the right fit in terms of their space.

We have a client who has excess space at {building} here in Calgary and is open to subleasing the fully furnished space depending on your current situation.

If this isn't a fit, feel free to share your criteria such as size, budget, location, and timing, and I can keep an eye out for opportunities that align.

Best,
